changes.value:
All 9 tests failing in `src/components/fields/editors/attachment-editor.test.tsx`:
- renders attachment filenames
- renders remove buttons for each attachment
- fires onChange with attachment removed/empty
- fires onChange with path appended
- does NOT fire onChange when cancelled
- filters out numbers, objects without id
- keeps a single AttachmentMeta object

May be related to FieldType::Attachment model change (see commit af273a4f4).

#test-failure
